venue_note: MEXC Spot V3 WebSocket persistent capture pipeline. Derived dataset with offline regime labels.
source_detail: Derived from artifacts/candles/mexc_strict_window_3091/candles.jsonl. Offline ADX/ATR regime assignment mirroring services/regime/service.py. See regime_assignment_manifest.json for full method details.
regime_labels_estimation_note: All regime_id values are estimated via deterministic offline ADX/ATR heuristic. NOT runtime-derived. Evidence class: controlled_lab_evidence.
evidence_class_note: Derived dataset with estimated regime labels. Upgrades to natural_paper_evidence only after a successful campaign produces SIGNAL->DECISION->ORDER->FILL chain.

replay_compatibility.candle_series_validation: Expected PASS (derived from strict_campaign_grade source, all fields unchanged except regime_id)

board_stage_note: Board stage is orthogonal to LR. Does not authorize live trading.
